share_basis_note: PRE-split. 2.47B shares x $379.80 = ~$938B (~$0.94T). 10:1 split (2024-06-07) is AFTER as-of and is NOT applied.

module_signals.finding: Anchor quarter + full-year baseline are from primary company sources (8-K press release, CFO commentary, FY23 10-K), price locked from a series and corroborated by dated same-day news. Material completeness high on the quarter; medium on forward earnings power and precise AI-accelerator share. Gaps (forward P/E not derivable, share %, supply-to-revenue conversion) are haircuts, not vetoes.

Generative-AI / LLM build-out is a real, dated demand shock: Data Center a record $4.28B and a Q2 guide of $11.0B (~+53% Q/Q, vs ~$7.2B consensus) — a forced market update, not a story. The scarce resource is full-stack accelerated compute (Hopper GPU + CUDA + NVLink/InfiniBand networking + advanced packaging/HBM supply), the bottleneck the whole industry must route through. This is an exceptional_bottleneck, not a generic semi cycle. Open question carried: how much of the guide is durable vs pull-forward.

NVDA captures the AI-compute profit pool via the CUDA/full-stack moat (software lock-in + GPU + networking from the Mellanox base), broad-based demand across CSPs/consumer-internet/enterprise, and a multi-year DC ramp ($6.7B->$10.6B->$15.0B). Operator grade 4/5: battle-tested 30y founder core (Huang+Malachowsky), clean one-share-one-vote governance, 12/13 independent board -> supports a HIGH durability read. Ceiling capped (not floored) by acute key-man/succession on a 60y founder with no disclosed heir, plus AMD MI300 (disclosed CES 2023) and latent hyperscaler custom silicon as the moat-erosion watch items.

Real, high-quality economics confirm the thesis: 64.6% GAAP / 66.8% non-GAAP GM rising to a guided 68.6%/70.0%; operating leverage (op income +70% Q/Q); fortress balance sheet ($15.32B cash+securities vs ~$10.95B debt; $2.91B OCF, $2.64B FCF). BUT the cycle position is split: Data Center inflecting hard while Gaming -38% Y/Y and ProViz -53% Y/Y, total FY23 revenue flat. Valuation is extreme on trailing numbers (GAAP P/E ~198x, non-GAAP ~124x) and a forward P/E is not derivable from primary sources. Net positive (margins/cash superb, growth durable-looking) but with a valuation/normalization warning that controls size.

Kill paths are real but not structural-impairment: (1) the $11B guide is partly AI pull-forward / double-ordering and DC demand normalizes -> the ~198x trailing multiple de-rates hard; (2) AMD MI300 + hyperscaler custom silicon erode the moat over the cycle; (3) supply/capacity + cloud obligations ($7.27B + $3.40B prepaid + $2.43B cloud) carry inventory/obligation risk if demand softens; (4) key-man event on Huang. None of these is permanent profit-pool loss or balance-sheet death at as-of, and management procured 2H supply with extended visibility. So this is a high-multiple / pull-forward / valuation-air-pocket risk that controls SIZE and downside, NOT a hard veto. The high multiple is NOT a false-cheap trap and the bottleneck reads real.

At ~$0.94T and ~198x trailing GAAP, price is a structured-entry modulator, not a hard veto, for an exceptional_bottleneck (harness rule). Downside is an optical-valuation air-pocket (a de-rate toward normalized DC earnings could be -40-60% on a pull-forward miss), survivable at a STARTER size with a fortress balance sheet behind it. Asymmetry favors a structured starter that scales on the ONE metric that forces the update: whether the $11B Q2 guide and DC backlog convert (revenue + DC margin holding), not the share price. Do not chase the post-print spike at full size; build on confirmation or on any de-rate.

starter_zone: Structured starter ~3% at/around the as-of ~$379.80 (do NOT chase materially above the print spike); add into any de-rate toward ~$300-340 (the pre-print ~$305 close zone) on unchanged thesis.
add_zone: Scale toward 8-12% ONLY on confirmation: Q2 FY24 revenue lands near/above the $11.0B guide AND Data Center margin holds toward the 70% non-GAAP guide AND demand reads broad/durable (not single-quarter pull-forward).
trim_or_no_chase_zone: No-chase above the immediate post-print level on new money at full size; trim only on thesis disconfirmation, not on weight.
binding_constraint: Demand durability vs pull-forward of the $11B Q2 guide (does the AI Data Center step-up convert and persist, or air-pocket) -> this, not the optical ~198x multiple, is what sizes the position; valuation only widens the band and caps initial size. Secondary cap: key-man/succession on Huang.
kill_criteria: Q2 FY24 revenue materially misses the $11B guide (demand was pull-forward / double-ordering, not durable) -> cut back to tracking.
Data Center revenue rolls over sequentially or DC gross margin compresses sharply -> thesis (pricing power / bottleneck) disconfirmed.
Credible evidence of large-scale CSP design wins away from NVDA to AMD MI300 or in-house silicon at the expense of NVDA DC share -> moat erosion.
Inventory / supply-commitment writedowns signal the procured 2H supply did not convert to revenue.
Huang departure/incapacitation with no credible pre-built succession -> reassess durability ceiling (trim, not necessarily exit).
runner_dissent: Modest discomfort, recorded per protocol: buying ~198x trailing GAAP / ~124x non-GAAP after a +160% YTD run and a one-day ~24% spike is the textbook 'priced for perfection near a top' setup, and a single Q2 revenue point (no full-year EPS guide) is thin proof of durability vs pull-forward. The classic value instinct says WAIT for a de-rate. The framework deliberately overrides that to a STARTER (not REJECT/WATCH-0%) because: this is the WEIGHTING_HARNESS exceptional_bottleneck case where valuation is a structured-entry modulator not a hard veto, the mechanism (full-stack AI-compute bottleneck) and economics (rising 70%-ish margins, fortress balance sheet, multi-year DC ramp) are real and primary-sourced, M5 shows valuation-air-pocket risk but no permanent impairment or balance-sheet death, and downside is survivable at small size. The honest residual risk is too_large_for_uncertainty if the guide proves to be pull-forward; the honest opposite risk (the one the harness was built to fix, cf. SNDK) is too_small_missed_asymmetry by demanding full MOS on a genuine bottleneck. Net: structured STARTER with confirmation-gated adds is the calibrated answer; valuation controls size and band, not the go/no-go.
